important_dates.raw: Approval Letter Date: 15-05-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: Updated Soon Last Date for Apply Online: Updated Soon Official Notification Release: Expected Soon

how_to_apply: Visit the official AP Power Utility / recruitment website once the notification is released
Read the detailed Assistant Executive Engineer notification carefully
Select the relevant utility and discipline
Register with valid email ID and mobile number
Fill in the online application form with correct academic and personal details
Upload required documents, photograph, and signature
Pay the application fee, if applicable
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are announced in AP Power Sector AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 629 Assistant Executive Engineer (AEE) vacancies have been approved across AP power utilities like APTRANSCO, APGENCO, APSPDCL, APCPDCL, and APEPDCL.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for AP AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.E / B.Tech degree in Electrical, Civil, or Telecom Engineering from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for AP Power Sector AEE posts?
faq.answer: Applicants must be between 18 to 42 years of age. Age relaxation details will be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. When will the AP AEE Recruitment 2026 notification be released?
faq.answer: The detailed official notification is expected to be released soon after the approval issued on May 15, 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Which organizations are included in AP Power Sector AEE recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes APTRANSCO, APGENCO, APSPDCL, APCPDCL, and APEPDCL.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AP AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The detailed selection process is yet to be announced but is expected to include a written exam, document verification, and merit-based selection.

faq.question: Q7. When will the online application for AP AEE Recruitment 2026 start?
faq.answer: The application start date has not been announced yet and will be updated in the official notification.
